body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `Reactant` package from `0.2.141 - 0.2.146` to `0.2.141 - 0.2.146, 0.2`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for Reactant in [weakdeps] to 0.2, (keep existing compat)

body:
This PR figures out to filter warnings from doctest outputs.

Also enhances some docstrings here and there.

labels.description: Tests get priority in case of emergency evacuation
labels.name: testing 🧪

title: Filter warnings from doctest output

body:

This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for AMDGPU in [weakdeps] to 2, (keep existing compat)
